query:
SELECT file_id    AS "file_id!: i64",
                  file_path  AS "file_path!: String",
                  file_size  AS "file_size?: i64",
                  format     AS "format?: String",
                  duration_ms AS "duration_ms?: i64"
             FROM book_files
            WHERE book_id = ? AND is_active = 1
            ORDER BY file_id
